# azureactions_devops_pipeline_trigger (Action)

Triggers an Azure DevOps pipeline run. Supports Personal Access Token (PAT) and service principal (Azure AD) authentication methods.

Set `organization_url` in the `azureactions` provider block. DevOps actions read this value from provider configuration and do not accept an action-level `organization_url` attribute.

When `auth_method` is `default_azure_credential` (or `service_principal` alias), the provider requests an Azure AD token using scope `499b84ac-1321-427f-aa17-267ca6975798/.default` and sends it as a `Bearer` token to Azure DevOps REST APIs.

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `auth_method` (String) Authentication method to use. Accepted values: `pat` (Personal Access Token) or `default_azure_credential` (reuses the provider-level Azure credential chain). `service_principal` is retained as a backwards-compatible alias for `default_azure_credential`.
- `pipeline_id` (Number) The integer ID of the pipeline to trigger.
- `project` (String) The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.

### Optional

- `branch_ref` (String) Git ref to run the pipeline against, e.g. `refs/heads/main`. When omitted the pipeline's default branch is used.
- `personal_access_token` (String) Personal Access Token (PAT) used when auth*method is `pat`. Must have Build (Read & execute) permission. Provide this value via a Terraform sensitive variable or the `TF_VAR*` environment variable to avoid it appearing in plan output.
- `stages_to_skip` (List of String) List of stage names to skip in the pipeline run.
- `template_parameters` (Map of String) Template parameter values. Keys are parameter names, values are parameter values.
- `timeout_minutes` (Number) Maximum time in minutes to wait for pipeline completion. Only used when wait_for_completion is true. Defaults to 30.
- `variables` (Map of String) Pipeline variable overrides. Keys are variable names, values are variable values.
- `wait_for_completion` (Boolean) Whether to wait for the pipeline run to reach a terminal state before returning. Defaults to false.

## Action Results

This action does not currently expose provider-defined Terraform expression outputs (for example, `run_id` or `result`) that can be referenced in `output`, `local`, or other expressions.

Run details are emitted as progress events during `terraform apply`, including:

- pipeline run ID
- initial state
- final state and result (when `wait_for_completion = true`)
